name: automation_run_tags_metadata_only
description: List-only fixture documenting that automation_run tags are caller metadata echoed into reports, not UE Automation filters.

expectedContract.precondition: Use a valid fullName from unreal.automation_list.
expectedContract.tagsBehavior: tags are stored verbatim in Saved/UnrealMcp/AutomationRuns/<runId>.json and echoed by automation_report; they are not passed to FAutomationTestFramework filtering APIs.
